Name: Full speed
Description: You can run at full|speed to make up|for a delay.

Name: Salary increase
Description: You can end a strike|with this pay raise.

Name: Maintenance crew
Description: The maintenance crew|can repair faults in|components and tracks.

Name: Tool
Description: The tools are useful for|repairing breakdowns and|damage.

Name: Advertising
Description: Your train has received|good reviews for its|punctuality.

Name: Locomotive breakdown
Description: Take the locomotive to|the depot for repairs.

Name: Track closure
Description: The route from here to|the next stop is closed.|Lose two rounds.

Name: Evacuation
Description: The station has been|evacuated due to a|threat.|Lose a round.

Name: Diversion
Description: You cannot reach the|next stop directly.|Use a siding.

Name: Diversion failure
Description: The nearest turnout to the|last train is not passable

Name: Warehouse fire
Description: You cannot load on this|round due to a fire|in the warehouse.

Name: Snow / Ice
Description: It has snowed and the|track is impassable.

Name: Track work
Description: There is track work.|Proceed at reduced speed|to the next stop.

Name: Delay
Description: The train is delayed.|Lose a round.

Name: Robbery
Description: The train has been|robbed and is damaged.

Name: Storm
Description: Due to the storm there|are delays because of the|condition of the tracks.|Lose a round.
